extName.description: Extension name (locked). Shown in the toolbar and Chrome Web Store.

extShortName.description: Short name shown where space is limited.

extDescription.message: Scan, filter, dedupe, and bulk-download a page's images. Dedupe that works. Sees nothing until you click.
extDescription.description: Store/manifest description. Leads with the two headline promises. Keep under 132 chars.

resultsHeaderTitle.description: App title in the results header.

resultsScanning.description: Shown while a scan is in progress.

resultsSelectAllVisible.description: Selects every image passing current filters.

resultsScanFullPage.description: Button that scrolls the page to load lazy images then re-scans.

resultsScanFullPageHint.message: Some images may load only as you scroll. This scrolls the page once, then re-scans — and runs only when you click.
resultsScanFullPageHint.description: Explains the full-page scan and its consent model.

resultsFullPageNoNew.message: No new images from the full-page scan

rescanFailed.message: Couldn't re-scan — the original tab may have been closed or navigated away.
rescanFailed.description: Shown when a full-page rescan can't reach the source tab.

resultsUpgradePro.description: Header button opening the Pro upsell.

upgradeProToast.message: You're on the free beta — every Pro feature is unlocked. 🎉
upgradeProToast.description: Shown when clicking Upgrade to Pro during the free beta.

resultsSortBy.description: Accessible label/tooltip for the sort dropdown.

menuHelp.description: Overflow menu: open the welcome/help page.

aboutLine.message: Bulk Image Downloader v$version$ · 100% local, no tracking.

filterHideDuplicatesSoon.message: Perceptual duplicate detection arrives in the next update.
filterHideDuplicatesSoon.description: Deprecated: former disabled-toggle hint. Kept for older locale fallbacks.

filterHideDuplicatesHint.message: Compares images once and hides near-duplicates, keeping the largest of each.
filterHideDuplicatesHint.description: Hint under the (now active) Hide-duplicates toggle.

dedupeFetching.description: Dedupe progress while fetching image bytes.

dedupeNoteHidden.description: Sidebar note under the toggle after dedupe.

dedupeNoteNone.description: Sidebar note when dedupe found none.

dedupeLimited.message: Too many images to compare — grouped exact duplicates only.
dedupeLimited.description: Dedupe skipped the near-duplicate pass on a very large set.

dupBarLabel.description: Accessible label for the All / Duplicates / Unique button group.

dupTabAll.description: Duplicate view tab: show every image.

dupTabDuplicates.description: Duplicate view tab: show only images that have near-duplicates.

dupTabUnique.description: Duplicate view tab: collapse each duplicate group to one image.

dupThresholdLabel.description: Label for the duplicate-similarity slider in the results toolbar.

filterOnlyThisPage.description: Filter toggle: images hosted on the scanned site only.

filterOnlyThisPageHint.message: Show only images hosted on this site — hides third-party / CDN images.

filterShownOfTotal.description: How many candidates pass the filters.

gridOpenOriginal.description: Open the full-size image in a new tab.

gridSelectImage.description: Accessible label for the per-image checkbox.

gridSizeUnknown.description: Shown when image dimensions are not known.

sourceShadow.description: Badge: inside an open shadow root.

footerNothingSelected.description: Footer hint when nothing is selected.

footerEstSize.description: Approximate total size of the selection.

footerDownloadZip.description: Downloads the selection as a single zip archive.

footerZipSoon.message: ZIP download arrives with folder rules in an upcoming update.
footerZipSoon.description: Deprecated: former disabled-ZIP tooltip. Kept for older locale fallbacks.

footerZipHint.message: Package the selected images into a single .zip file.

zipPackaging.description: Toast/overlay shown when a ZIP starts.

zipFetching.description: ZIP progress while fetching image bytes.

zipCompressing.description: ZIP progress while assembling the archive.

zipDoneSome.description: ZIP finished but some images could not be fetched.

zipNothingFetched.message: Couldn't fetch any of the selected images.

zipTooLarge.message: That selection is over the $limit$ ZIP limit — deselect some and try again.
zipTooLarge.description: ZIP refused: estimated size exceeds the cap.

zipBlockedPrompt.message: $count$ images are on servers that block direct access. Grant access to all sites to include them?
zipBlockedPrompt.description: Hybrid permission prompt when some image fetches are CORS-blocked.

zipGrantBtn.description: Requests the optional all-sites permission to fetch blocked images.

zipSkipBtn.description: Declines the permission and zips only what was fetched.

zipFreeLimit.message: Free ZIPs include up to $limit$ images. Upgrade for unlimited.
zipFreeLimit.description: Free-tier ZIP cap (not enforced during beta).

downloadRetryFailed.description: Retry only the downloads that failed.

downloadNoneSelected.description: Attempted download with an empty selection.

emptyTitle.message: No images found on this page

emptyBody.message: The scanner didn't see any images here. Some sites load images only as you scroll — try scanning the full page.

errorBody.message: This may be a browser page (like chrome:// or the Web Store) that extensions aren't allowed to read, or the page blocked the scan.

errorRestricted.message: This page can't be scanned. Browser pages and the Chrome Web Store are off-limits to all extensions.
errorRestricted.description: Shown when the active tab is a restricted URL.

analyticsPromptBody.message: May we collect anonymous, content-free usage stats — counts and feature names only, never URLs, filenames, or image data? It's off unless you say yes, and you can change it anytime in Settings.
analyticsPromptBody.description: Analytics opt-in explanation. Must match the options copy and privacy page.

popupScanning.description: Popup while the quick scan runs.

popupScanningFull.description: Popup while the full-page scan runs.

popupFoundOne.description: Popup count label, singular (number shown separately).

popupFoundOther.description: Popup count label, plural (number shown separately).

popupFrom.description: Popup sub-line: the page the images came from.

popupNoImages.message: No images found here. Some load only as you scroll — try a full-page scan.
popupNoImages.description: Popup when the quick scan found nothing.

popupScanFull.description: Scrolls the page to load lazy images, then re-scans.

popupRestricted.message: This page can't be scanned. Browser pages and the Web Store are off-limits to all extensions.

popupRetry.description: Retries the scan from the popup.

popupPrivacyNote.message: We only read this tab when you click the icon.

popupHelp.description: Popup footer: open the welcome/help page.

optionsBackToResults.description: Returns from Settings to the results view in the same tab.

optionsThemeHint.message: Use a light or dark look, or follow your system setting.

optionsDedupeThresholdHint.message: How similar two images must be to count as duplicates. Lower is stricter. Takes effect once perceptual dedupe ships.

optionsDedupeStrict.description: Low end of the dedupe slider.

optionsDedupeLoose.description: High end of the dedupe slider.

optionsHistoryHint.message: Remembers images you've downloaded before so you can skip repeats across sessions. Arrives with the dedupe update.

optionsAnalyticsHint.message: Off by default. Counts and feature names only — never URLs, filenames, or image data. Opt in to help improve the extension; turn it off anytime.
optionsAnalyticsHint.description: Analytics help text. Must match the prompt and privacy page.

optionsLocaleHint.message: Follows your browser language unless you choose one here.

optionsComingSoon.description: Badge for options not active yet.

optionsFolderRulesHint.message: Route downloads into Downloads subfolders by rule — evaluated top to bottom, first match wins. Chrome only allows subfolders inside your Downloads folder.
optionsFolderRulesHint.description: Folder-rules help text; states the Chrome subfolder ceiling.

commonPro.description: Badge for Pro-tier features (free during beta).

frNewRuleName.description: Default name for a new folder rule.

frEmpty.message: No rules yet — downloads go straight to your Downloads folder. Add a rule to route them into subfolders.

frAppliesToAll.message: Applies to every image (a catch-all default rule).
frAppliesToAll.description: Shown when a rule has no conditions.

frAddCondition.description: Adds a condition to a rule.

frPreviewPrefix.description: Prefix for a rule's folder preview.

frTestPlaceholder.description: Placeholder for the test URL input.

welcomeSubtitle.message: Find and save the images on any page. It reads nothing until you click.

welcomeHowLabel.description: Label above the three onboarding steps.

welcomeStep1Body.message: On any page with images, click the Bulk Image Downloader toolbar icon. That click is the only moment the extension reads the page.

welcomeStep2Body.message: Sift by size, type, domain, or name in a fast grid built for thousands of images. Perceptual dedupe arrives in the next update.

welcomeStep3Body.message: Download images one by one today. Bulk ZIP and folder-routing land in upcoming updates.

welcomePermissionPromiseBody.message: This extension asks for no access to any website when you install it. It can read a page only the moment you click its icon on that tab — nothing before, and nothing running in the background.

welcomeUseIt.message: For your product photos, your listings, your licensed assets.
